description:
Step 2 of T-012's 4-step CSP roadmap. T-012 Step 1 (per-request nonce middleware + nonced script/style tags) landed in commit 6d1d9de — nonces are live and the CSP Report-Only header reports any inline event handler now.

**Scope (re-inventoried 2026-05-15 with `grep -roh ' on[a-z]+="[^"]*"' app/templates/`):**
- 364 inline event handler attribute occurrences across templates
  (onclick, onchange, onsubmit, onmouseover, etc.)

**The right pattern:**
- Convert each `onclick="foo(arg)"` to `data-action="foo" data-arg="..."`.
- Add a single delegated listener at the bottom of `base.html`:
  ```js
  document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    const action = e.target.closest('[data-action]')?.dataset.action;
    if (action && window.actions?.[action]) window.actions[action](e);
  });
  ```
- Bundle action handlers into `static/js/actions.js` (one new external file, served as `'self'`).
- For non-click events, same pattern with separate delegated listeners.

**How to execute:**
- Best done with parallel agents working on file batches (one agent per top-level dir or per-feature subset under `templates/`).
- Test each affected page after conversion — htmx partials count too.
- Browser devtools console should show CSP report counts dropping after each batch.

**Out of scope:** the 101 templates with inline `style=` attrs (Step 3, separate ticket).

**Done when:** browser devtools shows 0 CSP violations for inline event handlers across the major routes (dashboard, fitting tool, star map, admin, intel, structure timers).</description>
title: CSP Step 2: refactor 364 inline event handlers to addEventListener (VVP-2026-007)
